# HttpFixer

> Free, browser-based HTTP developer tools. Fixers, not checkers.

HttpFixer generates exact copy-paste server config to fix HTTP issues — for your specific stack (Nginx, Cloudflare, Vercel, Apache, Express, FastAPI, Next.js).

## Core Tools

- HeadersFixer (/): Scans live URL for missing/misconfigured security headers. Returns exact config for detected stack.
- CORSFixer (/cors/): Sends real OPTIONS preflight. Returns exact CORS fix for detected framework.
- OAuthFixer (/oauth/): Diagnoses OAuth/OIDC errors (invalid_grant, redirect_uri_mismatch, PKCE failures).
- CSPFixer (/csp/): Scans live page for all resource sources. Generates working CSP policy.
- EdgeFix (/edge/): Audits Cache-Control, Vary, Age, X-Cache. Returns CDN caching fix.
- SpeedFixer (/speedfixer/): Live PageSpeed Insights audit. Returns Nginx/Cloudflare/Vercel config.
- Header Diff (/diff/): Compares HTTP headers between two URLs side by side.
- Cache-Control Simulator (/tools/cache-simulator/): Visualises any Cache-Control value as a timeline.
- HSTS Preload Checker (/tools/hsts-preload/): Queries preload list and scans live HSTS header.

## New Tools (April 2026)

- Cache-Control Generator (/generators/cache-control/): Generate Cache-Control headers for any asset type. 6 presets, 6 stack configs.
- CSP Validator (/tools/csp-validator/): Validate CSP strings against W3C spec. Score 0-100, flag unsafe directives.
- JWT Debugger (/tools/jwt/): Decode and validate JWTs. Flags none algorithm, missing expiry, expired tokens. Client-side only.
- Security Headers Scorer (/tools/header-scorer/): Score your security headers 0-100 with per-header breakdown and fix links.
- Mixed Content Fixer (/tools/mixed-content/): Find HTTP resources on HTTPS pages. Fix via CSP upgrade-insecure-requests or stack config.
- Redirect Chain Fixer (/tools/redirect-chain/): Follow redirect chains hop by hop. Detect loops, identify stack, generate fix for ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS.
- SSL Chain Visualizer (/ssl-chain/): Visualize SSL certificate trust chain. Flags missing intermediates that break mobile clients.

## Generators (no URL required)

- CSP Generator: /generators/csp/
- CORS Header Generator: /generators/cors/
- Permissions-Policy Generator: /generators/permissions-policy/
- Security Headers Generator: /generators/security-headers/
- Cache-Control Generator: /generators/cache-control/

## Error Reference

- /errors/ — hub for all HTTP error messages
- /errors/blocked-by-cors-policy/ — CORS preflight failures
- /errors/err-too-many-redirects/ — redirect loop errors
- /errors/mixed-content-blocked/ — HTTP resources on HTTPS pages
- /errors/starlette-cors-wildcard-credentials/ — FastAPI/Starlette CORS wildcard + credentials error
- /errors/redirect-uri-mismatch/ — OAuth redirect URI errors
- /errors/invalid-grant-error/ — OAuth invalid_grant

## Glossary

- /glossary/ — HTTP and web security term definitions
- /glossary/cors/ — Cross-Origin Resource Sharing
- /glossary/csp/ — Content Security Policy
- /glossary/hsts/ — HTTP Strict Transport Security
- /glossary/xss/ — Cross-Site Scripting
- /glossary/pkce/ — Proof Key for Code Exchange

## Key constraints

- All processing is client-side — no data leaves the browser
- No signup, no accounts, no tracking
- MIT licensed — github.com/metriclogic26/httpfixer
- Live HTTP fetch is the AI moat — responses require fetching the actual URL

## Stack detection

HeadersFixer, SpeedFixer, CORSFixer, Redirect Chain Fixer detect the server stack from Server: header and proxy headers (Cf-Ray, X-Vercel-ID, X-NF-Request-ID).

## Part of MetricLogic

- configclarity.dev — Server & DevOps tools
- domainpreflight.dev — Domain & email authentication
- httpfixer.dev — HTTP headers, CORS, CSP, OAuth, SSL (this site)
- metriclogic.dev — Network hub
